choose.when: AND ( CB."BOARD_TITLE" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
choose.otherwise: AND ( CB."BOARD_TITLE" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" ILIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID"
WHERE CB."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum}

SELECT B.*, M."MEMBER_NAME", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_FILE" BF WHERE BF."BOARD_NUM" = B."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "FILE_COUNT" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" B LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON B."MEMBER_NUM" = M."MEMBER_NUM" WHERE B."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum} ORDER BY B."BOARD_NUM" DESC LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}

SELECT CB."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", CB."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", CB."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter", CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory", CB."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate", CB."HIT" AS "hit", CB."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB LEFT JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID" WHERE CB."BOARD_NUM" = #{boardNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID" WHERE CB."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum}

SELECT
CB."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", CB."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", CB."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", CB."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter",
M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName",
CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory",
CB."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate",
CB."HIT" AS "hit",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_FILE" BF WHERE BF."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "fileCount",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_COMMENT" BC WHERE BC."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "commentCount"
FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID"
WHERE CB."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum}
ORDER BY CB."HIT" DESC NULLS LAST, CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC
ORDER BY "commentCount" DESC, CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC
ORDER BY ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_LIKE" BL WHERE BL."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) DESC, CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC
ORDER BY CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC
LIMIT #{perPage} OFFSET #{startNum}
SELECT * FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" WHERE "CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum} ORDER BY "BOARD_NUM" DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "TB_CLUB_BOARD" ( "BOARD_TITLE", "BOARD_CONTENTS", "BOARD_WRITER", "BOARD_CATEGORY", "CLUB_NUM", "CREATE_DATE" ) VALUES ( #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, #{boardWriter}, #{boardCategory}, #{clubNum}, NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select: SELECT CB."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", CB."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", CB."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", CB."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter", CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory", CB."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate", CB."HIT" AS "hit", M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID" WHERE CB."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum} AND CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" = '공지' ORDER BY CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT M."MEMBER_NUM"
FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID"
WHERE CB."BOARD_NUM" = #{boardNum}

SELECT B."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", B."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", B."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter", B."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", B."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", B."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory", B."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate", B."HIT" AS "hit", C."CLUB_NAME" AS "clubName" FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" B INNER JOIN "TB_CLUB" C ON B."CLUB_NUM" = C."CLUB_NUM" WHERE B."BOARD_WRITER" = #{memberId} ORDER BY B."BOARD_NUM" DESC

SELECT CB."BOARD_NUM" AS "boardNum", CB."CLUB_NUM" AS "clubNum", CB."BOARD_TITLE" AS "boardTitle", CB."BOARD_CONTENTS" AS "boardContents", CB."BOARD_WRITER" AS "boardWriter", CB."BOARD_CATEGORY" AS "boardCategory", CB."CREATE_DATE" AS "createDate", CB."HIT" AS "hit", M."MEMBER_NAME" AS "memberName",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_COMMENT" BC WHERE BC."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "commentCount",
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_LIKE" BL WHERE BL."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) AS "likeCount"
FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD" CB
JOIN "TB_MEMBER" M ON CB."BOARD_WRITER" = M."MEMBER_ID"
WHERE CB."CLUB_NUM" = #{clubNum}
AND ( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_LIKE" BL WHERE BL."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) >= 5
AND
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_COMMENT" BC WHERE BC."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) >= 3 )
ORDER BY ( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_LIKE" BL WHERE BL."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) * 5 + ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "TB_CLUB_BOARD_COMMENT" BC WHERE BC."BOARD_NUM" = CB."BOARD_NUM" ) * 3 ) DESC, CB."BOARD_NUM" DESC
LIMIT 5
